lessons: bounded-loop-over-unbounded-wait: Replicator orchestrator wait-for-frame deadlocked forever; a bounded update loop cannot hang.
fail-loud-not-silent-fallback: A sampler that silently placed features at the last spot on exhaustion caused overlaps; return None and skip.
read-stderr-not-app-log: The Isaac "white box" was a Python TypeError on stderr, not a GPU bug; the app log never showed it.
retry-prefix-matching-in: FAIL: selftest still red -> retry: prefix matching in classify()
ABSOLUTE_ZERO.blob: ABSOLUTE_ZERO  Project Experience Engine spec — turns each completed project into a reusable case and surfaces the closest past case when a similar project starts. Context Budget Manager spec — builds the optimal context package per request within a token ceiling. Obsidian Dataview dashboard — active goals, recent sessions, open faults, newest lessons. Workflow Orchestrator spec — central runtime routing every request through classify, recall, execute, verify, summarize. Planning Engine spec — decomposes requests into validated, executable, dependency-ordered implementation plans. Plugin Intelligence Engine spec — discovers tools, builds a capability database, routes requests to optimal plugin chains. Project scaffolder spec — creating a project auto-injects the closest past case. Prompt Compiler spec — dynamically constructs optimized, validated prompts from intent, context, experience, tools and budget. Skill Discovery Engine spec — determines which skills load for a request, ordered, deduplicated, conflict-resolved. V3 Token Intelligence — budgets, no-LLM gate, adaptive pipeline, one retrieval layer, profiler. Verification Engine spec — eleven checks over every modification, confidence score, gated verdict before completion. Build-phase checklist for the vault itself; the live to-do the /wake command reads. Vishnu's hardware, toolchain, and active projects — the fixed facts every session loads first. Hard-won engineering rules; grows one entry at a time via the /review command. FAIL: selftest still red -> retry: prefix matching in classify() Fault log for the vault/OS itself. prompt-compiler changeset committed while `verifier.py check`

decisions: 2026-06-27 — Localization anchor = ground-image mosaic, injected to EKF — Chose:** periodic absolute ORB-homography fix vs a geo-referenced map →
2026-06-27 — All processing on base-station laptop, Pi Zero = pure relay — Chose:** relay GStreamer/UDP video + MAVLink through Pi 0; compute on laptop.
2026-06-24 — Isaac Sim over Gazebo — Chose:** Isaac Sim.
2026-06-25 — USD-native material binding, not PreviewSurfaceCfg — Chose:** build `UsdPreviewSurface` directly via `UsdShade`.

`data_generator` stuck forever; kit log stops after "Replicator Step".
faults.fix: drop the orchestrator; tick `simulation_app.update()` a bounded

faults.symptom: drone explores but Return-To-Home never registers arrival.
faults.fix: measure distance to base_station in the absolute frame.

faults.symptom: rocks stacked on streaks/soil; markers buried in renders.
faults.fix: return `None` on exhaustion; every caller skips; largest-footprint-first.

ASUNAMA ---
tags: [project, overview, drone, navigation, isaac-sim]

summary: IRoC-U 2026 GPS-denied autonomous survey drone; Isaac Sim arena + vision-anchored base-station nav.

# ASUNAMA — Overview

## Goal
Team ASUNAMA, IRoC-U 2026: a **GPS-denied** autonomous survey drone that maps a
Martian arena, detects terrain features, and returns to base — no GPS, bounded
drift, ≥95% coverage, zero boundary breaches, under wind.

## Stack
- Sim: Isaac Sim 6.0.0 + Isaac Lab 0.54.4 at `C:\isaaclab`
  (`env_isaaclab\Scripts\python.exe`). Repo: Replicator orchestrator wait-for-frame deadlocked forever; a bounded update loop cannot hang. RTH checked distance to (0,0) but home was the base station; mission never completed. Single-cell coverage marking couldn't reach 95%; mark the camera footprint instead. A sampler that silently placed features at the last spot on exhaustion caused overlaps; return None and skip. Optical-flow dead reckoning drifted unbounded under wind; fixed with periodic absolute visual fixes. The Isaac "white box" was a Python TypeError on stderr, not a GPU bug; the app log never showed it. ArduPilot non-GPS vision-positioning params — EK3_SRC1, VISO_TYPE, VISION_POSITION_ESTIMATE, EKF origin. auto-bootstrap of ASUNAMA - python/MAVLink, NumPy stack, OpenCV, PyTorch, pytest, 277 files, 8 risks Key locked decisions — Isaac over Gazebo, absolute visual fix, base-station processing, USD-native materials. Real ASUNAMA faults — white box, headless deadlock, RTH frame bug, feature piling, coverage stall. IRoC-U 2026 GPS-denied autonomous survey drone; Isaac Sim arena + vision-anchored base-station nav. Sim mission verified; pre-flight items remain (ORB refs, FC params, Pi-0 relay, bench hover). Root-caused the Isaac white box (PreviewSurfaceCfg TypeError) and headless deadlock; both fixed. Full mission verified live (100% coverage, PRECLAND OK); fixed feature piling and RTH frame bug. Added absolute visual fix + base-station rearchitecture; full-mission validation hit the 95% bar. 2026-06-27 — Localization anchor = ground-image mosaic, injected to EKF — Chose:** periodic absolute ORB-homography fix vs a geo-referenced map → 2026-06-27 — All processing on base-station laptop, Pi Zero = pure relay — Chose:** relay GStreamer/UDP video + MAVLink through Pi 0; compute on laptop. 2026-06-24 — Isaac Sim over Gazebo — Chose:** Isaac Sim. 2026-06-25 — USD-native material binding, not PreviewSurfaceCfg — Chose:** build `UsdPreviewSurface` directly via `UsdShade`. empty white Kit viewport, "not responding", every colored spawn. `data_generator` stuck forever; kit log stops after "Replicator Step". drone explores but Return-To-Home never registers arrival. rocks stacked on streaks/soil; markers buried in renders. exploration plateaus under acceptance threshold. MAVLink NumPy stack OpenCV PyTorch counts external internal markers primary pytest
